identity: Human male dragon knight, stern scarred face partially hidden behind a dragon-crested helm, glowing orange eyes visible through the visor, tall massive build.
outfit: Black-and-crimson overlapping dragon-scale plate armor with sharp angular pauldrons, each ending in a dragon claw motif. A great helm shaped like a snarling dragon head with curved horns. A tattered crimson cape.
weapons: A massive two-handed greatsword with a flame-pattern blade and a dragon-hilt, held in both hands in front.
attackStyle: East-facing. Greatsword swung in a huge horizontal arc, flame trails on the blade. Crimson cape flares.
spellStyle: East-facing. Greatsword planted tip-down, both hands on the pommel, a billow of orange dragon-fire breath rising from the blade.
blockStyle: East-facing. Greatsword held vertically in front, both hands on the hilt, blade guarding the body. Dragon helm forward.
koStyle: East-facing, collapsed to one knee, greatsword point-down stabbed into the ground as a prop, head bowed, helm visible.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), imposing idle. Greatsword held tip-down in front with both hands on the hilt. Dragon helm stares forward, crimson cape behind.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Dragon-crested helm with curved horns, orange eye-glow through visor, black-and-crimson scale plate.

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (this image becomes the canonical identity anchor — preserve in every downstream frame): Human male dragon knight, stern scarred face partially hidden behind a dragon-crested helm, glowing orange eyes visible through the visor, tall massive build.

OUTFIT: Black-and-crimson overlapping dragon-scale plate armor with sharp angular pauldrons, each ending in a dragon claw motif. A great helm shaped like a snarling dragon head with curved horns. A tattered crimson cape.

WEAPONS: A massive two-handed greatsword with a flame-pattern blade and a dragon-hilt, held in both hands in front.

CLASS: humanoid. Full-body view, head to feet visible. Character occupies ~70% of the canvas height. Feet aligned near the bottom; headroom above.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle. Head up, eyes visible. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a close-up — entire character from head to feet.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette, transparent background, no ground shadow.

portrait.prompt:
IDENTITY (must match reference sheet exactly): Human male dragon knight, stern scarred face partially hidden behind a dragon-crested helm, glowing orange eyes visible through the visor, tall massive build.

OUTFIT: Black-and-crimson overlapping dragon-scale plate armor with sharp angular pauldrons, each ending in a dragon claw motif. A great helm shaped like a snarling dragon head with curved horns. A tattered crimson cape.

WEAPONS: A massive two-handed greatsword with a flame-pattern blade and a dragon-hilt, held in both hands in front.

POSE (portrait): Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Dragon-crested helm with curved horns, orange eye-glow through visor, black-and-crimson scale plate.

FRAMING: bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view, centered in a 256x256 canvas, shoulders fill the lower third.

SCALE (non-negotiable): character must occupy approximately 180px of the 256px canvas height — roughly 70%. Do NOT stretch or upscale. Extra space above head and/or below feet is correct.

STYLE: pixel art, transparent background, no ground shadow, no borders, no text. Match the palette and style of the reference sheet.

NEGATIVE: do not add weapons or props not listed in WEAPONS. Do not change palette, species, or outfit from the reference sheet. Do not zoom in — respect SCALE.
